scripts.pages:build: cross-env DATABASE_URL="mongodb+srv://dummy:dummy@localhost/dummy?retryWrites=true&w=majority" npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build --dangerouslyUseUnsupportedNextVersion && rm -rf deploy && mkdir -p deploy && cp -rv .open-next/assets/* deploy/ && cp -v .open-next/worker.js deploy/_worker.js && cp -rv .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/middleware .open-next/server-functions .open-next/.build deploy/ && node generate-routes.js
